name: caveman
description: Ultra-focused concise-response control with ultra and off modes.

interface.shortDescription: Makes replies ultra-short and easier to scan.
interface.longDescription: Adds the `toggle` skill for switching this chat into ultra-compressed reply mode when you want terse debugging, review, or progress updates.
defaultPrompt: /caveman:toggle then explain why this test is failing in 2 short lines.
/caveman:toggle and review these staged changes with only blockers and fixes.
/caveman:toggle off then restate the last answer in normal prose.
